title: Retail Theft Rises: Two Ways For Investors To Beat Shrinkage
text: Shrinkage, inventory shrink, it's a growing problem today. While always present, shrinkage emerged as a growing problem early in 2023 when Target NYSE: TGT reported it as an impact on profits.

title: Why Is Avery Dennison (AVY) Up 0.8% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Avery Dennison (AVY) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: The 7 Most Undervalued Industrial Stocks to Buy Now: August 2023
text: The rally in tech stocks that lifted the broader market is falling victim to the dog days of August. Investors looking to make a pivot away from overvalued tech stocks may want to look at undervalued industrial stocks.

title: New Strong Sell Stocks for August 10th
text: ARCT, AVY and ASB have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List on August 10, 2023.
